name: Calum Dear
summary: PhD-trained Data Engineer specialising in Python analytics, scalable data pipelines, and AI/ML integration. Experienced building production data infrastructure cross-functionally in agile environments, encompassing LLM-driven automation, cloud-based AWS pipelines, and data quality frameworks.

experience.title: Data Engineer
bullets: Designed and built production-grade data pipelines integrating product, inventory, order, and fulfilment data between Shopify and additional marketplaces, resulting in ~12% revenue growth.
Deployed AWS Lambdas to perform ETL of supplier inventory feeds, synchronise Shopify stock levels, and store historical S3 snapshots for time-series modelling.
Developed LLM-powered automation workflows using OpenAI API, including programmatic data validation and AI-generated product content from structured attributes and image vision analysis.
Built margin-aware pricing intelligence systems using Python and SQL, aggregating competitor data, applying statistical models, and using LLM-based product matching to generate optimised RRPs.
Established data governance and taxonomy frameworks to support rapid nationwide scale-up in a retail environment.
Led agile delivery workflows between the business and logistics/inventory stakeholders, managing a capability roadmap and iterating features based on operational feedback.

experience.title: Ph.D. Researcher
bullets: Built reproducible Python analytics pipelines (pandas, NumPy, SciPy, matplotlib) for data ingestion, cleaning, transformation, model fitting, and visualisation across a £1m multi-institution research programme.
Designed and analysed large experimental datasets, applying statistical modelling and multivariate regression to identify performance drivers.
Established and maintained data governance standards across cross-functional academic and industry teams, ensuring reproducibility and compliance under commercial IP frameworks.

Communicated quantitative findings through peer-reviewed publications, technical reports, and conference presentations, demonstrating the ability to surface insights from complex data clearly and credibly.

publications_presentations.label: Publications
publications_presentations.text: First-author papers in APL Materials and Journal of Physics D (see ORCID, Scholar).

publications_presentations.label: Conferences
publications_presentations.text: Presented at 11 academic conferences to audiences of 100+ (notably NAMBE 2024, Boston, US and ICMBE 2024, Matsue, Japan).

leadership: I have consistently sought positions of responsibility. I served as a student representative throughout my BSc, MSc, and Ph.D., and played a central role in the undergraduate mentoring programme, eventually coordinating the mentoring provision across the entire college. I also spent a year managing a high-volume cocktail bar, leading staff and overseeing day-to-day operations.

skills.label: Data Science
skills.text: statistical modelling, regression analysis, data cleaning/validation, feature engineering, data visualisation (matplotlib).

skills.label: AI/LLMs
skills.text: OpenAI API workflows, structured content generation, automated validation.
